title: Goofy ahh Painting
description: This project adds a goofy ahh painting
body:
This is the absolute state-of-the-art, best-in-class, completely unrivalled and unquestionably foremost prime mod you will ever lay your eyes on. Nothing else even comes close. It’s so absurdly good that words barely do it justice—just trust me on this one.

![the stare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a17b1fed23e882f4ae2bb8ba617e7bd7ef085bf9.jpeg)
